NCT04261712.label: Outcome
NCT04261712.source: Journal of cerebral blood flow and metabolism : official journal of the International Society of Cerebral Blood Flow and Metabolism
NCT04261712.text: Randomized patients received a single intravenous injection of an allogenic Muse cell-based product, CL2020 (n = 25), or placebo (n = 10), without immunosuppressant, 14-28 days after stroke onset.

NCT02781727.label: Outcome
NCT02781727.text: CTX (100 mg/kg i.p.) was administrated to mice from day 1 to day 3 (d1-d3) continuously except for the control group.
